chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 20 – The Salawāt (Blessings) upon the Prophet Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the People<sup>asws</sup> of his<sup>saww</sup> Household

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/107)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/107)
text: سَمِعَ أَبِي رَجُلًا مُتَعَلِّقاً بِالْبَيْتِ وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ.
فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبِي يَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ لَا تَبْتُرْهَا لَا تَظْلِمْنَا حَقَّنَا قُلِ
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Al Qadah,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> overheard a man attaching to the House (Kaaba) and he was saying,
So my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘O servant of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! Do not amputate it! Do not be unjust to us<sup>asws</sup> of our<sup>asws</sup> rights! Say,
‘O Allahazwj! Send Salawāt upon Muhammadsaww and the Peopleasws of hissaww Household’.
en.sarwar: 21. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ja’far ibn Muhammad from ibn al-Qaddah from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “My father once heard a man, clinging to the Ka’bah, saying, ‘O Lord, grant al-Salat (favors) to Muhammad.’ My father then said to him, ‘O servant of Allah, do not shorten it that way. Do not do injustice to us in our rights. Say, “O Lord, grant al-Salat to Muhammad and his family.’”
